classifications.requirement: 2 | 1. For ID, successful update: a. New limit value will be effective immediately without any cooling off period per transaction rail. (Cooling off period = 0) b. Changes of limits is allowed for multiple times (no restriction) per transaction rail, per day. (Frequency = 0) NBGO: By Country - Cooling off period (defined in HH:MM) - for increase, decrease, OR increase and decrease. If set to 0 indicates no cooling off period required. - Daily limit Change Frequencies per Day. If set to 0 indicates no limit to change frequecies per day. | NGBO: 1. By Country - Cooling off period for Daily Limit Change, in HH:MM for increase and/or decrease of limit
